nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: Sir David Olifard was born in 1190, in Morayshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Sir Walter Olifard of Bothwell and Abernethy Knight and Isabel Lothian. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Dervorgilla Munfichet. He died in 1253, at the age of 63.

it.lifeSummary: Sir David Olifard è nato il nel 1190 nel Morayshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlio di Sir Walter Olifard of Bothwell and Abernethy Knight e Isabel Lothian. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Dervorgilla Munfichet. Morì nel 1253, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.Bothwell Castle, Morayshire, Scotland: イギリススコットランドモーアイシュアイア
ja.Aberdalgie, Perth and Kinross, Scotland,: イギリススコットランドペルス アンド キンロスアバーダルジ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir David Olifardは1190年にイギリススコットランドモーアイシュアイアでSir Walter Olifard of Bothwell and Abernethy KnightとIsabel Lothianの息子として生まれた。彼はDervorgilla Munfichetとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1253年に63歳で死去した。

ko.Aberdalgie, Perth and Kinross, Scotland,: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 압르다기
ko.lifeSummary: Sir David Olifard(은)는 1190년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이실르에서 Sir Walter Olifard of Bothwell and Abernethy Knight(와)과 Isabel Lothian의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Dervorgilla Munfichet(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir David Olifard родился в 1190 г. в местности мореишир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir Walter Olifard of Bothwell and Abernethy Knight и Isabel Lothian. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Dervorgilla Munfichet. Он умер в 1253 г. в возрасте 63 лет.
